chapter_title: About the Invocation a Muslim should use upon

hadith_entries.text:
401. Narrated Abu-Sa'eed: 'Whenever the Messenger of
Allah had a new garment he used to name it, for example a
turban, or a shirt and say: “O Allah! Praise belongs to You.
You have caused me to wear this. I ask You the good of it and
the good in making it. And I seek refuge with You from the
evil of it and the evil in making it." (At-Termizi)
*
Book of the due Manner of Sleeping
